name: subagents: /doctor --check agents lists both review-node-boundaries and review-node-observability among installed subagents
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/doctor.sh" --check agents 2>out.txt && grep "review-node-boundaries" out.txt 1>&2 && grep "review-node-observability" out.txt 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
